task_context.task: navigate: Find a language model released within the last 60 days on Hugging Face that specializes in generating educational content.
task_context.title: Models – Hugging Face

args.query: Hugging Face model search stopped on empty results after weak truncated query; likely inefficient search for task requiring recent educational content model

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

args.query: Hugging Face models search zero results truncated query recent educational content model task

args.expected_behavior: Use task-specific filters/queries to narrow Hugging Face models to a recent language model that specializes in educational content, then verify a concrete matching result with release recency and specialization before exiting.
args.actual_behavior: The agent entered a weak, broad query ('language educational content'), ended up on a zero-results Models page, and exited without finding or verifying any candidate model or checking the 60-day release constraint.
args.regression_rule: When the task has multiple explicit constraints and the initial search yields no results, refine the query or apply available filters/sorts instead of exiting from an empty results page.

evidence.claim: The task required a language model on Hugging Face released within the last 60 days and specialized in generating educational content.
The final visible state was Hugging Face Models search with no results visible; the search chip was truncated and the page showed 'Models 0'.
The high-detail step report says the release-within-60-days and educational-content specialization constraints were not visible, and no model cards/results were shown.
The search query used was 'language educational content', which is broad and did not express the recency constraint.
A similar failure memory recommends using task-specific search inputs and filters rather than broad browsing.

suggested_followups.label: Find better query
suggested_followups.message: Search Hugging Face models with recency and educational-content terms directly, then inspect candidates.

suggested_followups.label: Check filters
suggested_followups.message: Use task filters like Text Generation and sort options to narrow to recent models.
